subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1913-04-25
subcodes.first_line: During the first year of our arrival in Baghdad, one day Mirza Javad asked me to go out with him to an outlying district. At this time, Arabian robbers frequented the roads
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @stories; anecdotes, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
